unit_level_invariants.balanced_panel: each id must appear exactly once per observed time period
unit_level_invariants.dose_constancy: D must be constant within id
unit_level_invariants.group_constancy: G must be constant within id
unit_level_invariants.absorbing_treatment: after treatment starts, the experienced dose remains fixed by D

unsupported_cases.predicate: panel violates unique id/time pairs or each-id complete observed time support
input is not a unit-level panel that observes the same id over time
unsupported_cases.error: repeated cross-sections data is not supported by the PanelData contract
unsupported_cases.python_guard: PanelData only exposes id/time long-panel inputs

unsupported_cases.predicate: D changes within id across observed time periods
a caller asks for covariate-dose interaction or nonparametric covariate adjustment
unsupported_cases.error: additive covariate adjustment is supported via ContDIDSpec.covariates; interaction terms and nonparametric covariate adjustment are not supported
unsupported_cases.python_guard: ContDIDSpec.covariates accepts optional additive covariate columns; interaction and nonparametric routes raise ContDIDValidationError

non_goals: Do not infer repeated cross-section support from row-level pandas input.
Do not treat extra metadata columns as covariate-adjusted identification.
Do not add covariate-dose interaction or nonparametric covariate adjustment without a paper/reference-supported contract.
Do not relax balanced-panel, G constancy, or D constancy guards.
